description: Interprets natural language schedule inputs from users, confirms planned in-office days, queries stored team schedule data to identify teammate overlaps, and returns team presence summaries grouped by department. Handles schedule updates and removals via conversational interaction.

example_response.message: The assistant's conversational response to the user
example_response.action: The action type: mark_days, remove_days, query_presence, general_response
example_response.summary: Brief summary of what was done or the query result
